arts.ttl: Will Erling Haaland be Available to Play for Manchester City Against Leicester City?
arts.sum: Erling Haaland was substituted in the second half of Manchester City's FA Cup game against Bournemouth with an apparent injury.

arts.sum: Leicester City could look to address their goalscoring issues in the summer transfer window by signing a striker to step into Jamie Vardy's shoes.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Leicester: Pep Guardiola's side should 'comfortably' avoid 'disaster' as Premier League top-five prediction is made
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole that "something has to go disastrously wrong" for Pep Guardiola's side not to beat Leicester City in Wednesday's Premier League clash at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: City hopeful injury won't end Haaland's season
arts.sum: Erling Haaland is set for a spell on the sideline with an ankle injury picked up against Bournemouth on Sunday, but Manchester City remain hopeful the striker will be able to play again this season and take part in the FIFA Club World Cup this summer.
